title: FAMILY SHELTER - 211info
text: GOOD NEIGHBOR CENTER FAMILY SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a family shelter with active assessment and action plans, tenant education, and support. Families have up to 90 days to fulfill their plans and goals. Families have access to their own private rooms. The shelter is equipped with food from community donors for the guests to use to prepare their own meals daily. 11130 SW Greenburg Road Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Pregnant women and families with partial or full custody or guardianship of children under 18 years of age Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 640-3263 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 640-3263 Community Connect Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call Community Connect to complete an intake and to be placed on a shelter referral waiting list FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Social Security card, driver's license, or state ID card LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 76, 78 Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Families Community Shelters * Pregnant Individuals If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOOD NEIGHBOR CENTER
